zh.lifeSummary: 當Gräfin Margarethe von Fürstenberg於1240年出生在德國巴登可萊斯 奧分波格度爾巴賀霍恩格時，她的父親Heinrich I. Graf von Freiburg und Urach, Heinrich I. Graf von Fürstenberg21歲，母親Agnes Gräfin von Truhendingen18歲。她和Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch至少有3個兒子和6個女兒。她去世於1295年10月在德國爾特波格奧拉赤 圖特林根瑟廷根吉賀格享年55歲，埋葬在德國爾特波格奧拉赤 圖特林根瑟廷根吉賀格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gräfin Margarethe von Fürstenberg于1240年出生在德国巴登可萊斯 奧分波格度爾巴賀霍恩格时，她的父亲Heinrich I. Graf von Freiburg und Urach, Heinrich I. Graf von Fürstenberg21岁，母亲Agnes Gräfin von Truhendingen18岁。她和Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch至少有3个儿子和6个女儿。她去世于1295年10月在德国爾特波格奧拉赤 圖特林根瑟廷根吉賀格享年55岁，埋葬在德国爾特波格奧拉赤 圖特林根瑟廷根吉賀格。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Fürstenberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) (Fürstenberg): habitational name from any of the many places so named, from the genitive case of Old High German furisto ‘prince’, modern German Fürst (see Furst ) + berg ‘mountain, hill’. As a Jewish surname, it is mainly artificial.

variants.name: Furst
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Eugen, Kurt, Gunter, Hans, Herta, Maximilian, Ulrich.

German and Swiss German (Fürst): nickname from Old High German furisto ‘the first, most noble one’, a cognate of Old English fyrest ‘first, foremost’. The surname Fürst is also found elsewhere in central Europe, e.g. in Czechia and Slovenia. Compare Feerst , Fierce , Fierst , First , and Fuerst .
Jewish (Ashkenazic; Fürst): artificial name from German Fürst ‘prince’. Compare Fuerst .

variants.name: Fuerstenberg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Helmut, Otto.

nameMeanings.name: Margarethe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Gräfin Margarethe von Fürstenberg was born in 1240, in Hohenberg, Durbach, Kreis Offenburg, Baden, Germany, her father, Heinrich I. Graf von Freiburg und Urach, Heinrich I. Graf von Fürstenberg, was 21 and her mother, Agnes Gräfin von Truhendingen, was 18. She had at least 3 sons and 6 daughters with Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch. She died in October 1295, in Kirchberg, Seitingen, Tuttlingen, Württemberg, Germany, at the age of 55, and was buried in Kirchberg, Seitingen, Tuttlingen, Württemberg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gräfin Margarethe von Fürstenberg est née en 1240, à Hohenberg, Durbach, Kreis Offenburg, Baden, Allemagne, son père, Heinrich I. Graf von Freiburg und Urach, Heinrich I. Graf von Fürstenberg, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Agnes Gräfin von Truhendingen, avait 18 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles avec Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch. Elle est décédée en octobre 1295, à Kirchberg, Seitingen, Oberamt Tuttlingen, Württemberg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Kirchberg, Seitingen, Oberamt Tuttlingen, Württemberg, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gräfin Margarethe von Fürstenberg 1240 in Hohenberg, Durbach, Kreis Offenburg, Baden, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Heinrich I. Graf von Freiburg und Urach, Heinrich I. Graf von Fürstenberg 21 und ihre Mutter Agnes Gräfin von Truhendingen 18. Sie hatte mit Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb im Oktober 1295 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Kirchberg, Seitingen, Oberamt Tuttlingen, Württemberg, Deutschland und wurde in Kirchberg, Seitingen, Oberamt Tuttlingen, Württemberg, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gräfin Margarethe von Fürstenberg è nata il nel 1240 nel Hohenberg, Durbach, Kreis Offenburg, Baden, Germania, sua padre, Heinrich I. Graf von Freiburg und Urach, Heinrich I. Graf von Fürstenberg, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Agnes Gräfin von Truhendingen, aveva 18 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie con Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch. Morì nel ottobre 1295, nel Kirchberg, Seitingen, Oberamt Tuttlingen, Württemberg, Germania, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Kirchberg, Seitingen, Oberamt Tuttlingen, Württemberg, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Gräfin Margarethe von Fürstenbergが1240年にドイツバデンクレイス オフエンブルグダルバチホーヘンバーグで生まれた時，父Heinrich I. Graf von Freiburg und Urach, Heinrich I. Graf von Fürstenbergは21歳，母Agnes Gräfin von Truhendingenは18歳であった。彼女はGraf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerlochとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1295年10月にドイツウuルッテンバーグオバーアムト トゥットリンジェンセイティンジェンキルチバーグで55歳で死去し，ドイツウuルッテンバーグオバーアムト トゥットリンジェンセイティンジェンキルチバーグにて埋葬された。

ko.Hohenberg, Schwarzwaldkreis, Wuerttlembe: 독일 바든 크레이스 펜버그 뒤르바치 호헨버그
ko.Burg Fürstemberg, Fürstenberg-Hüfingen: 독일 바든 크레이스 펜버그 뒤르바치 호헨버그
ko.Hohenberg, Schwarzwaldkreis, Württemberg: 독일 바든 크레이스 펜버그 뒤르바치 호헨버그
ko.Kirchberg, Seitingen, Tuttlingen, Herrsc: 독일 wu르테버그 오베램트 튜틀링 세이틴겐 커ch버그
ko.Hohenberg An Der Eger,Oberfranken,Bavari: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 w시들 임 피ch텔그비르지 호헨버그 앤 데르 거
ko.lifeSummary: Gräfin Margarethe von Fürstenberg(이)가 1240년 독일 바든 크레이스 펜버그 뒤르바치 호헨버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Heinrich I. Graf von Freiburg und Urach, Heinrich I. Graf von Fürstenberg(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Gräfin von Truhendingen(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1295년 10월 독일 wu르테버그 오베램트 튜틀링 세이틴겐 커ch버그에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 wu르테버그 오베램트 튜틀링 세이틴겐 커ch버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gräfin Margarethe von Fürstenberg nasceu em 1240, em Hohenberg, Durbach, Kreis Offenburg, Baden, Alemanha, seu pai, Heinrich I. Graf von Freiburg und Urach, Heinrich I. Graf von Fürstenberg, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Gräfin von Truhendingen, tinha 18 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas com Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch. Ela faleceu em outubro de 1295, em Kirchberg, Seitingen, Oberamt Tuttlingen, Württemberg, Alemanha, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Kirchberg, Seitingen, Oberamt Tuttlingen, Württemberg, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gräfin Margarethe von Fürstenberg родилась в 1240 г. в местности хохенбирг, дурбач, крис оффенбург, баден, Германия, её отцу по имени Heinrich I. Graf von Freiburg und Urach, Heinrich I. Graf von Fürstenberg было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes Gräfin von Truhendingen, 18. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей от Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch. Она умерла октябрь 1295 г. в местности кирчбирг, ситинген, обирамт туттлинген, вuрттембирг, Германия в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности кирчбирг, ситинген, обирамт туттлинген, вuрттембирг, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gräfin Margarethe von Fürstenberg nació en 1240, en Hohenberg, Durbach, Kreis Offenburg, Baden, Alemania, su papá, Heinrich I. Graf von Freiburg und Urach, Heinrich I. Graf von Fürstenberg, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Agnes Gräfin von Truhendingen, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas con Graf Albrecht II. von Hohenberg-Rottenburg Albrecht von Haigerloch. Murió en octubre de 1295, en Kirchberg, Seitingen, Oberamt Tuttlingen, Württemberg, Alemania, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Kirchberg, Seitingen, Oberamt Tuttlingen, Württemberg, Alemania.
